# Evaporation Rate

**Summary**: The loss of water from a surface due to phase change into vapor.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] measured evaporation-rate in the sabkha environment.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] Critical for understanding water resources and managing salinity in arid regions.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] Direct measurement using a portable chamber.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Seasonal rates were 0.25 mm/day (winter), 0.47 mm/day (spring), and 0.50 mm/day (summer). ([[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016, p. 11]])
